target: Phase 2 Results Page Enhancement - Mistake Reason Codes, Evidence Text, Retry Wrong Only

summary.overall_result: Backend API correctly returns reason_code, reason_label, evidence_text, and reason_summary. Frontend components have correct data-testid attributes and rendering logic.

integration_issues.issue: Session/auth sometimes lost on page reload during testing - React requires user in state

features_tested.feature: Backend: reason_code and reason_label for wrong answers
features_tested.details: classify_reason_code() correctly returns reason codes: UNANSWERED, TFNG_CONFUSION, YNNG_CONFUSION, SPELLING_ERROR, DISTRACTOR_TRAP, NEAR_MISS, WRONG_ANSWER
reason_summary dict in response correctly counts each reason code type. Total matches wrong answer count.
extract_evidence_text() extracts ~160 char passage excerpt around correct answer. Returns empty string if not found.
Empty strings and whitespace-only answers correctly classified as UNANSWERED
Wrong T/F/NG answers on true_false_ng question type correctly classified
Answers with 70-99% character similarity to correct answer detected as SPELLING_ERROR
All required testids present: reason-summary-card, reason-summary-{CODE}, reason-badge-listening-{qnum}, reason-badge-reading-{qnum}, evidence-reading-{qnum}, retry-wrong-only-btn, retry-wrong-banner

features_tested.feature: Frontend: Why You Lost Marks card
features_tested.details: CambridgeTestResults.js line 408-445: reasonSummary state renders card with icon, counts per reason code

features_tested.feature: Frontend: Reason badges in review sections
features_tested.details: Listening (line 678-688) and Reading (line 788-798) sections render reason badges with color-coded styling
Reading review (line 815-833) shows evidence_text when present, 'Evidence not available' when null/empty
Line 1112-1137: Button shows count of wrong questions, navigates with retryWrongOnly state
CambridgeTestInterface.js line 2913-2920: retry-wrong-banner displays when retryWrongOnly=true

seed_data_creation: None - uses existing ielts17/test1 test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Results Enhancement is fully implemented. Backend correctly classifies mistake reasons, extracts evidence text, and aggregates reason summary. Frontend components have proper data-testid attributes and rendering logic. To UI test the results page, complete a Cambridge test with intentionally wrong answers to trigger the evaluate/full-test endpoint. The results page requires location.state with answers and testData.

pytest_results.failure_details: test_health_check failed (404) - health endpoint not implemented, not critical
